etymology.description: semantic 㕯 (to speak slowly) + phonetic 章 -> to estimate the inside from outside -> commerce, trade
etymology.interpretation: The character initially meant 'to estimate the inside from outside', which implies a process of evaluation similar to trade. Over time, this sense naturally extended to the concept of 'commerce' as both involve assessing value and making exchanges. The original combination of speaking slowly and considered estimation links to deliberation necessary in trading activities.

examples.chinese: 这个商店每天都很忙(這個商店每天都很忙)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège shāngdiàn měitiān dōu hěn máng.
examples.english: This shop is busy every day.

examples.chinese: 我们在讨论商业计划(我們在討論商業計劃)。
examples.english: We are discussing the business plan.

examples.chinese: 他毕业后进入了商业领域(他畢業後進入了商業領域)。
examples.pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu jìnrùle shāngyè lǐngyù.
examples.english: He entered the business field after graduation.
